# RIID-4630: ApprovalRequested Timeout Owner Cleanup

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/migrationdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to daemon-lifecycle-cli](../daemon-lifecycle-cli.md)

This slice closes public daemon `Q-RT-003` by moving the approval wait timeout decision into provider-runtime SSOT.

## Policy

- C4 session actor run clocks own approval wait timeout policy.
- `Q-RT-003` stays out of daemon open questions.
- `EventIngestor` remains an append authority only, not a timeout owner.
- UI/review surfaces remain display and response senders, not terminal timeout sources.
- A focused public workflow fails if `Q-RT-003` drifts back into open questions.
- Reducer tests keep `EventToolApprovalNeeded` as semantic activity that resets the idle watchdog.

This slice does not change provider-native approval RPC frames, add UI, change CLI flags, introduce dependencies, or alter hard/semantic timeout defaults.
